issue_summary: Fixed last findbug issue, which was real
javadoc_before:
/** * Write the contents this to the target #ZipArchiveOutputStream. *

* It may be beneficial to write things like directories and manifest files to the targetStream * before calling this method. *

* * @param targetStream The ZipArchiveOutputStream to receive the contents of the scatter streams * @throws IOException If writing fails * @throws InterruptedException If we get interrupted */
javadoc_after:
/** * Write the contents this to the target #ZipArchiveOutputStream. *

* It may be beneficial to write things like directories and manifest files to the targetStream * before calling this method. *

* * @param targetStream The ZipArchiveOutputStream to receive the contents of the scatter streams * @throws IOException If writing fails * @throws InterruptedException If we get interrupted * @throws ExecutionException If something happens in the parallel execution */
